name: signbridge-isl-enterprise-platform
description: Enterprise AI-Powered Sign Language Recognition and Translation Platform (Indian Sign Language - ISL)

scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: echo "Running enterprise test suite across frontend, backend, and ai-service" && pytest backend/app/tests ai-service/app/tests && npm run test --workspace=frontend

author: SignBridge Enterprise Team
